hero.title: Omnichain Node Nesting Begins
hero.description: Run decentralized nodes on modular edge hardware. Earn rewards while supporting blockchain networks with our energy-efficient devices.

modularStack.title: Modular Edge Stack
modularStack.description: Stack compute, storage, and network modules to scale your decentralized node infrastructure.

architecture.title: Architecture & Spec
architecture.description: NodeNest is built as layered edge infrastructure — from modular hardware to on-chain reward tracking.

items.edge: Raspberry Pi / RK3588 class edge device

buildLog.title: Follow the Build
buildLog.description: NodeNest is in active development. Join the waitlist for early builder access and follow our public build log.

products.title: Premium Hardware
products.description: Engineered for reliability and performance with sleek, modern design

features.nodes: Support for up to 3 blockchain nodes
Support for up to 5 blockchain nodes

dashboard.title: Real-Time Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor your node performance, rewards, and network activity in real-time

monitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Track node performance, rewards, and network activity as it happens

multichain.title: Multi-chain Support
multichain.description: Run nodes for multiple blockchains simultaneously from one interface

updates.title: Automated Updates
updates.description: Software updates are automatically applied to keep your nodes running smoothly

devices.title: Choose Your Style
devices.description: NodeNest devices come in a range of colors to match your style and setup

rewards.title: Rewards & Earnings
rewards.description: Earn passive income by running blockchain nodes on your NodeNest device

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: NodeNest makes running blockchain nodes simple and profitable

setup.title: Plug & Play Setup
setup.description: Connect your NodeNest device to power and internet. The device automatically configures itself.

networks.title: Select Networks
networks.description: Choose which blockchain networks you want to support through the NodeNest dashboard.

nodes.title: Run Nodes
nodes.description: Your device begins validating transactions and supporting the blockchain networks you selected.

rewards.title: Earn Rewards
rewards.description: Receive NNT tokens and native chain rewards directly to your wallet for your contribution.

newsletter.title: Join the Waitlist
newsletter.description: Get early builder access, hardware updates, and launch notifications. No pre-order required.
newsletter.terms: By subscribing, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

footer.tagline: Web3 modular edge computing device for blockchain node execution

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates, announcements, and exclusive offers.

uploader.title: Image Upload
uploader.description: Upload images to showcase your NodeNest device
